---
title: "Grace Harriet Guinness"
---

## Grace Harriet Guinness

**Dates:** (1847-1929)

**Maiden name:** (Butler)

### Description

daughter of the Very Rev. W. J. Butler

### Biography

She married (17 April 1866) the Rev. Robert Guinness (1841-1918),  [<i>Guinness Family</i>;  LG 1952 Guinness of Wootton Hall]

### Letters

- [To Mary Caroline Butler, April 11th 1899](../letters/3403_To_Mary_Caroline_Butler.html)
- Letter from April 2 [1886]
- Letter from [1861]
- Letter from Novr 20th [1860]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
